scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:desktop
scripts.test:rust: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo check --workspace --locked && cargo test --workspace --locked
scripts.test:draft-fixtures: cargo test -p draft_model schema_fixtures -- --nocapture && cargo test -p draft_model draft_fixtures -- --nocapture
scripts.test:project-store: cargo test -p project_store create_project_bundle -- --nocapture && cargo test -p project_store round_trip -- --nocapture && cargo test -p project_store path_resolution -- --nocapture
scripts.test:material-probe: cargo test -p media_runtime material_probe -- --nocapture && cargo test -p testkit material -- --nocapture
scripts.test:phase2-source-guards: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; ! rg -n "\b(Asset|Clip)\b" crates/draft_model/src crates/bindings_node/src schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated; ! rg -n "durationSeconds|duration_seconds|seconds: f32|seconds: f64|\bf32\b|\bf64\b" crates/draft_model/src schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated; ! rg -n "ffmpeg|ffprobe" apps/desktop-electron/src; ! rg -n "probe_material_metadata|FfmpegExecutor|ffprobe|ffmpeg|add_material|upsert_material|mark_material_(available|missing|probe_failed)" crates/project_store/src; ! rg -n "\b(thumbnails|waveforms|previewCaches|renderGraph|ffmpegScripts|rawProbeJson|exports|proxyFiles|thumbnailPath|waveformPath|previewCachePath)\b" schemas/draft.schema.json apps/desktop-electron/src/generated/Draft.ts fixtures/draft/positive'
scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:schema && pnpm run test:draft-fixtures && pnpm run test:project-store && pnpm run test:runtime && pnpm run test:material-probe && pnpm run test:material-service && pnpm run test:bindings && pnpm run test:desktop && pnpm run test:render-smoke && pnpm run test:phase2-source-guards && pnpm run test:contracts
